description: Composition Orange printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a V-neck, short sleeves, two button placket with mother of pearl buttons, embellished panel around neckline and no vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The bright print will lift your mood while the sweet mother of pearl buttons keep you looking feminine. Wear this over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
